properties.name: hawk.mqtt.broker.enable
properties.description: MQTT Broker是否启用,默认值为：true

properties.name: hawk.mqtt.broker.port
properties.description: MQTT Broker监听端口,默认值为：1883

properties.name: hawk.mqtt.broker.host
properties.description: MQTT Broker 监听地址,默认值为：0.0.0.0

properties.name: hawk.mqtt.broker.message-size
properties.description: MQTT Broker 单个消息最大尺寸,默认值为：1048576 字节

properties.name: hawk.mqtt.broker.thread-pool-size
properties.description: MQTT Broker 线程池大小,默认值为：1

properties.name: hawk.mqtt.broker.storage-path
properties.description: MQTT Broker 持久化存储路径,默认值为：当前目录
